articles.title: Announcing ADK for Kotlin and ADK for Android 0.1.0: Building AI Agents on Android and Beyond
articles.snippet: Google has announced the launch of version 0.1.0 of the Agent Development Kit (ADK) for Kotlin, alongside a specialized ADK library for Android. This open-source framework simplifies the creation of AI agents by managing complex orchestration, session sharing, and error handling across cloud and edge environments.
